tool_input.command:
git add -A && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Rebrand: Appetyt → Dim Hour, migrate domain to dimhour.com

Full rebrand across code, content, and configs:
- Domain: appetyt.app → dimhour.com (CNAME, canonical URLs, og tags, sitemap, robots.txt)
- iOS bundle ID: app.appetyt.ios → app.dimhour.ios (Capacitor, Info.plist, pbxproj)
- App display name: Appetyt → Dim Hour (manifest, Info.plist, Capacitor)
- Updated 100+ city subpage templates, scripts, concierge system prompt,
  service worker cache keys, localStorage keys, and utm_source params
- App Store listing, iOS feasibility doc, CLAUDE.md, and project rules refreshed

Requires App Store resubmission (new bundle ID) and DNS cutover to
dimhour.com (GitHub Pages A records already configured).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01G5U4Bc1SSdWTeSBbqF3Um9
EOF
)" 2>&1 | tail -20
echo "---"
git push -u origin claude/update-claude-md-GOKwQ
